rationale.R1.7: The delegation 'check the citations' directly and exclusively tasks the agent with verifying reference accuracy: correct author names, years, publication identity, proper attribution of claims to sources, and coverage of relevant prior work. This is load-bearing — the entire delegation collapses if citation verification is not performed correctly. Notably, the artifact contains a high-suspicion case: 'Kowalski et al. (2019)' is attributed as the originators of COMET, yet the same paragraph separately cites 'Rei et al. (2020)' for COMET, strongly suggesting a fabricated or misattributed citation.
